news.t: High Dividend ETFs: A 2026 Sector Perspective
Yieldy ETFs gain on a tepid day for stocks
5 High-Yield ETFs to Buy for Long-Term Income
Dividend ETFs suffer sharpest daily drop in two weeks as companies cut payouts
Analysts Anticipate 13% Upside For The SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 High Dividend ETF

holdings.infoBox: SPYD is an equity ETF with a total of 83 individual holdings. The top holdings are Iron Mountain stock at 1.59%, Host Hotels & Resorts at 1.57%, Franklin Resources at 1.55%, APA Corporation at 1.52%, and EOG Resources at 1.47%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 High Dividend ETF (SPYD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 High Dividend index. The fund tracks an index of the 80 highest-yielding stocks selected from the S&P 500. Stocks are equally-weighted. SPYD was launched on Oct 21, 2015 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Dividend ETFs suffer sharpest daily drop in two weeks as companies cut payouts
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to dividends slumped Thursday as more companies reported cutting their dividends or considering doing so, to conserve cash for operations.

data.title: Analysts Anticipate 13% Upside For The SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 High Dividend ETF
data.text: For the SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 High Dividend ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $41.42 per unit.
